sglang.title: optimize: reduce shulffle and quantization overhead in cutlass_moe sm90
sglang.author: TianQiLin666666
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In #8678, per_token_group_quant_fp8_hopper_moe_mn_major is called after shuffle_rows. This approach shuffles hidden_states in bf16 and increases the tokens to quantize by top-k fold,  which is inefficient. We optimize this workflow by first quantizing the hidden_states prior to shuffling

sglang.title: Tiny Llama4 type error in constructor
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix the type error.

self.use_rope doesn't need to be an int
self.use_rope should be a boolean because:

It's used as a boolean flag:

if self.use_rope:  # Natural boolean check
    # do something

RadixAttention expects boolean:

self.attn = RadixAttention(
    # ...
    use_irope=self.

sglang.title: [DP] fix: engine crash when decode batch is padded
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In DP attention, a decode batch can be padded to the chunk prefill size when it is processed with other prefill batches, which incurs engine crash as its tensor shape is larger than the kv_indices buffer in attention during the decode phase.
Modifications

We modify the decode batch and

sglang.title: [hicache] Optimization for DMA copy
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Using cudaMemcpy for KV cache offloading is inefficient because each call only transfers page_size * head_dim entries. To better utilize the bandwidth, multiple contiguous tokens can be coalesced into one transaction.

Modifications
Include CPU operations to solve for ranges which are con

sglang.title: [Fix] Fix hicache backend
sglang.author: DarkSharpness
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It is a known issue that FA3 kernels do not work well with hicache kernels.
When running FA3 decode kernels while hicache kernels are writing from GPU to CPU, an illegal memory access error may occur.
Previously, we worked around this by either:

Avoiding the FA3 backend entirely, or
Usin

vllm.title: [Config] add "qwen" as a native eagle3 target supported model
vllm.author: lec77
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add "qwen" to the eagle3_target_supported model list in config.py, so that Qwen models can run with Eagle3 by setting speculative_config.
Previously, "qwen" was only enabled for Eagle3 when draft_model_config was provided with SpeculatorsConfig.
The architectures of Qwen3-Eagle3 drafter mode

vllm.title: Refactor sliding window configuration to Transformers best practice
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Uses layer_types instead of sliding_window_pattern
Removes custom interleaved_sliding_window as it should not be necessary

Unlike the last time I tried to remove sliding_window: list[int] (#18494 (comment)), this PR correctly maps Mistral format sliding window configuration to the new HF style slid
